name: GraphicsDrawer
summary: The GraphicsDrawer class draws temporary graphics in the currently active rendered view in Tekla Structures.

constructors.name: GraphicsDrawer
constructors.summary: Creates a new graphics drawer instance.

methods.name: DrawLineSegment(LineSegment, Color)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary line segment in the currently active rendered view.

methods.name: DrawLineSegment(Point, Point, Color)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary line segment in the currently active rendered view.

methods.name: DrawMeshLines
methods.summary: Draws the mesh lines as temporary graphics in the currently active Tekla Structures rendered view.

methods.name: DrawMeshSurface
methods.summary: Draws the mesh surface as temporary graphics in the currently active Tekla Structures rendered view. The counterclockwise sides of the mesh triangles are drawn.

methods.name: DrawPolyLine
methods.summary: Draw a temporary polyline into all open Tekla Structures views.

methods.name: DrawText
methods.summary: Draws a temporary text in the currently active rendered view.

methods.name: DrawTextToView
methods.summary: Draws a temporary text to the specified view. You can set the view Identifier.ID = 0 for current active view.

methods.name: RemoveTemporaryGraphicsObject
methods.summary: Remove a temporary graphic object from all views.

methods.name: RemoveTemporaryGraphicsObjects
methods.summary: Remove a list of temporary graphic objects from all views.
